You kept scrolling through your phone until you eventually (and accidentally) found a picture of Horror. You found yourself getting hard again.*

*Horror walked up the stairs, into your room, a plate of food in his huge hands. He knocked on your bedroom door.* "Hey, Dust? I made you food." *He called out. No answer. Instead of knocking again, he reached for the handle and opened the door. You had forgotten to lock the door.*

"Dust? I made y-" *Horror cut himself off as he saw you jerking off. He froze in place, shocked and embarrassed.*
